mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_behavior (user_id, topic_id, interaction_type, device_fingerprint, ip_address, is_valid, invalid_reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, #{interactionType}, #{deviceFingerprint}, #{ipAddress}, #{isValid}, #{invalidReason})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, topic_id, interaction_type, device_fingerprint, ip_address, is_valid, invalid_reason, created_at FROM user_behavior WHERE is_valid = 0 AND created_at >= #{startTime} AND created_at < #{endTime} ORDER BY created_at DESC
